description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Pink sling bag with a zipped main compartment, an inner zipped pocket, pleated design on the front and back, one metallic chain handle, one leather removable handle, stitch detailing and brand badge appliqued on the front Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions: 14 cm x 21 cm
